pinyin: xué ér bù sī zé wǎng
meaning_ja: 学んでも考えなければ無駄になる
meaning_en: Learning without thought is labor lost

pinyin: sān rén xíng, bì yǒu wǒ shī yān
meaning_ja: 三人で歩けば、その中に必ず自分の師となる人がいる
meaning_en: Among any three people walking together, one can surely be my teacher

pinyin: jǐ suǒ bù yù, wù shī yú rén
meaning_ja: 自分がされたくないことは、人にもしてはいけない
meaning_en: Do not impose on others what you yourself do not desire

hanzi: 知之为知之，不知为不知，是知也
pinyin: zhī zhī wéi zhī zhī, bù zhī wéi bù zhī, shì zhī yě
meaning_ja: 知っていることを知っていると言い、知らないことを知らないと言う、それが本当の知恵である
meaning_en: To know what you know and know what you do not know, that is true wisdom

pinyin: wēn gù ér zhī xīn
meaning_ja: 古きを訪ねて新しきを知る
meaning_en: Review the old to learn the new

hanzi: 有朋自远方来，不亦乐乎
pinyin: yǒu péng zì yuǎn fāng lái, bù yì lè hū
meaning_ja: 友が遠方から訪ねてくるのは、なんと楽しいことか
meaning_en: Is it not delightful to have friends coming from afar?

pinyin: shì zhě rú sī fū, bù shě zhòu yè
meaning_ja: 過ぎゆく時は、この川の流れのように昼夜を問わず流れ去る
meaning_en: Time passes like this flowing river, never resting day or night

hanzi: 工欲善其事，必先利其器
pinyin: gōng yù shàn qí shì, bì xiān lì qí qì
meaning_ja: 職人が仕事をうまく行いたければ、まず道具を研ぐべきである
meaning_en: A craftsman who wants to do good work must first sharpen his tools

pinyin: xué ér shí xí zhī, bù yì yuè hū
meaning_ja: 学んで時にこれを復習する、なんと喜ばしいことか
meaning_en: Is it not a pleasure to learn and practice what is learned time and again?

pinyin: rén wú yuǎn lǜ, bì yǒu jìn yōu
meaning_ja: 遠い先のことを考えなければ、必ず身近な心配事が起こる
meaning_en: He who gives no thought to distant troubles will find worry near at hand

pinyin: dào kě dào, fēi cháng dào
meaning_ja: 道と言葉にできる道は、永遠不変の道ではない
meaning_en: The Tao that can be spoken is not the eternal Tao

pinyin: qiān lǐ zhī xíng, shǐ yú zú xià
meaning_ja: 千里の道も一歩から始まる
meaning_en: A journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step

pinyin: zhī rén zhě zhì, zì zhī zhě míng
meaning_ja: 人を知る者は智恵があり、自分を知る者は明知である
meaning_en: Knowing others is wisdom; knowing yourself is enlightenment

pinyin: shàng shàn ruò shuǐ
meaning_ja: 最上の善は水のようなものである
meaning_en: The highest good is like water

pinyin: dà dào zhì jiǎn
meaning_ja: 偉大な道理ほどシンプルである
meaning_en: The greatest truths are the simplest

hanzi: 祸兮福之所倚，福兮祸之所伏
pinyin: huò xī fú zhī suǒ yǐ, fú xī huò zhī suǒ fú
meaning_ja: 禍のなかに福が寄り添い、福のなかに禍が潜んでいる
meaning_en: Misfortune is what fortune leans upon; fortune is where misfortune hides

hanzi: 吾生也有涯，而知也无涯
pinyin: wú shēng yě yǒu yá, ér zhī yě wú yá
meaning_ja: 我が人生には限りがあるが、知識には限りがない
meaning_en: My life has a limit, but knowledge has none

pinyin: jǐng wā bù kě yǐ yǔ yú hǎi
meaning_ja: 井戸の中の蛙とは海について語ることができない
meaning_en: A frog in a well cannot discuss the ocean

hanzi: 相濡以沫，不如相忘于江湖
pinyin: xiāng rú yǐ mò, bù rú xiāng wàng yú jiāng hú
meaning_ja: 泡で互いを湿らせ合うよりも、川や湖で互いを忘れて自由に生きる方がよい
meaning_en: Better to forget each other in the rivers and lakes than to moisten each other with spit

pinyin: wàn wù yǔ wǒ wéi yī
meaning_ja: 万物と我は一体である
meaning_en: All things and I are one
